hero_sub: Transparent tracking, consistent ROAS. I build performance setups that still make economic sense at six-figure monthly budgets.
logos_eyebrow: Platforms & channels I work with every day
t1_quote: Jose transformed our Google Ads performance in just a few weeks — clear strategy, clean execution, measurable ROAS.
t2_quote: The Shopify store went live fast, was technically solid and converted from day one. Very professional collaboration.
t3_quote: The UX audit uncovered real problems we hadn't seen before. The drop-off rate in onboarding has dropped significantly since.
svc_headline: From the first pixel to the next conversion.
svc_sub: A structured process — from website to tracking, traffic and optimised conversions. Every phase builds on the previous one.
p1_desc: I eliminate cart abandonment before it happens — through clean Liquid, fast templates and a theme that respects your margin structure. No app-stack hell, no code graveyard.
p2_desc: GA4, GTM, server-side setups and clean conversion definitions. No duplicate events, no ROAS lies, no reports that look prettier than they are.
p3_desc: On-page, Core Web Vitals and backlink strategy for e-commerce and B2B. I'm not talking about keywords — I'm talking about revenue coming in from organic clicks.
p4_desc: Performance campaigns on Google, Meta and TikTok — from funnel architecture to daily optimisation. Full-funnel tracking, transparent budget, ROAS targets defined before campaign launch.
p5_title: CRO With Data, Not Gut Feeling
p5_desc: Heatmap analysis, A/B testing and UX research that reveal where visitors drop off — and above all why. Lift hypotheses with a business case, not split-testing for testing's sake.
p6_title: GEO — Visible in ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini
p6_desc: I structure your content so AI assistants cite you — through JSON-LD, semantic hierarchy and AI-optimised answer architecture. The next organic channel — before your competitors discover it.
cases_sub: Real campaigns, real numbers — from performance marketing and Shopify development to UX research and brand building.
c1_desc: Full Google Ads strategy for a fashion D2C brand in the DACH market. Budget scaled from under €5K to €30K/month — ROAS consistently above 13× with a CPA of €9 at an average cart value of €80.
c2_desc: Shopify store built from scratch — custom Liquid theme developed, product structure and checkout flow optimized. Local Google Ads campaigns and CRO measures implemented based on Clarity heatmaps.
c3_desc: UX lead for a German-language eLearning video platform. Journey audit, depth interviews and usability tests identified weaknesses in onboarding and navigation. Result: A/B test roadmap, revised prototypes, reduced course drop-offs.
c4_desc: Market launch of a technology-driven dog food brand — complete brand build, user interviews, value proposition tests and first app flow prototypes. MVP roadmap and backlog prioritization for the scaling phase.
s1_desc: Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn. Full-funnel strategy, audience architecture, ROAS scaling. From €800 to €30K/month managed independently.
s2_desc: Custom Liquid and theme development, conversion rate optimization, UX improvements based on Clarity heatmaps and A/B test data.
s3_desc: Technical SEO, Generative Engine Optimization for LLM citations (ChatGPT, Perplexity), JSON-LD schema markup, AI workflow automation for content scaling.
about_text:
I'm Jose — Senior Performance Marketer and Shopify Developer based in Hamburg. For over 5 years I've helped D2C and B2B brands in the DACH market achieve measurable results: from ad strategy to checkout, from first click to returning customer.

My approach is data-driven, pragmatic and scalable — no agency overhead, direct communication, clear KPIs.
geo_sub: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is the SEO successor for the AI era. I optimise content so AI assistants use it as a source — not just found, but cited.
ct_sub: Whether Google Ads scaling, Shopify development or GEO strategy — I help DACH brands achieve measurable results. Remote, flexible.
footer: © 2026 Jose L. Treff — JLT Marketing Services
aud1_desc: You're scaling a Shopify store and need performance that grows with you. I handle ad management, CRO and technical setup as one package — senior output without agency markup.
aud1_stack: Google Ads · Meta Ads · TikTok Ads · Shopify Liquid · GA4
aud2_desc: You have a senior-level need and no permanent headcount for it. I work as an external performance lead or Shopify dev under your branding — white-label, transparent, with a clear scope.
aud3_desc: You want to be visible — including in the post-Google world. GEO/AI visibility, LinkedIn performance and tracking architecture for longer sales cycles. Strategy over tool-switching.
